---
name: 🧠 System Design
about: Design and implement a gameplay or backend system in Godot (C#)
title: "[System] ..."
labels: ['🧠 gdsystem']
assignees: ''
---

## 🧠 System Summary

> _What is the system for?_  
> _E.g., “Inventory system that supports stackable items and hotbar”_

## 🎯 Goals

- [ ] Core functionality
- [ ] API / signal design
- [ ] Integration with other systems
- [ ] Persistence / serialization
- [ ] Testing strategy

## 🧪 Use Cases

> _List 2–3 user stories or in-game examples this system must support._

## 🛠️ Components

> _Break the system into scripts/classes._  
> _E.g., `InventoryManager.cs`, `Item.cs`, `PickupItem.tscn`_

## 📚 References

> _Link relevant issues, documents, or inspiration from other games/systems._
